## Simulate data

## Setting the prior

We fit a location and scale mixture of AR(2) models using three components, that is, $p = 2$ and $K = 3$. We use weakly informate priors for the parameters, that is, $a_{1} = a_{2} = a_{3} = 1$, $\mathbf{m}_{0} = \begin{bmatrix}0 & 0\end{bmatrix}^{\top}$, $\mathbf{C}_{0} = 10 \cdot \mathbf{I}_{2}$ and $n_{0} = d_{0} = 1$.
